task_description: Phase 4 - Sprite Integration for Plague of Danjin. Replace placeholder colored rectangles with authentic 8-bit pixel art generated programmatically via Pixmap. Create sprite generation system, animation state machine, visual effects (particles, damage numbers), and integrate sprites into all UI components and screens.

verification.summary: Clean build (./gradlew clean classes) passes. No test framework configured - compile-only validation. All review issues fixed (missing particle_physical key, damage flash no-op, CASTING state). No model/ or controller/ files modified.
